title: Notion Template Sales Page Copy Swipe File for Creators
description: Notion template creators selling on Gumroad or their own site get a swipe file of 12 high-converting product page structures with annotated headlines, benefit bullets, and FAQ sections pulled from top-selling templates.
gumroad_description:
Your product page is losing sales because you're guessing at what copy actually converts instead of learning from templates that already sell.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Notion template creators who've launched on Gumroad but haven't cracked their conversion rate yet
— Builders selling their own templates and wondering why competitors get more sales with similar products
— Anyone tired of staring at a blank page wondering what headline or benefit bullet will actually land

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 15 real product page structures from top-selling Notion templates, annotated to show you exactly why each section works
— Copy-ready headlines, benefit bullets, and FAQ answers you can adapt in minutes
— Both Markdown and JSON formats so you can paste directly into your sales page or Gumroad
— Usage notes explaining the psychology behind each approach

Stop reverse-engineering successful competitors in your head. See exactly what converts, adapt it, and ship a page that sells.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
